name: shop-mcp-server
description: Autonomous agent shop — buy physical products with USDC on Base. No credit card, no human checkout. Search products, get a quote, send USDC on-chain, and receive physical goods shipped via Printful.

tools.name: get_quote
tools.description: Get USDC price quote with payment instructions

tools.name: place_order
tools.description: Verify on-chain USDC payment and create Shopify order for fulfillment

tools.name: get_order_status
tools.description: Track fulfillment and Printful shipping status
